parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `bg.local.goods.list.query`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageSize
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page size, indicating the number of records returned per page, with a limit of 100 per page

x-temu-request-parameters.name: orderField
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sorting field. Supports sorting by goodsId, createTime, goodsName, outGoodsSn, quantity, price. Sorted by creation time by default

x-temu-request-parameters.name: orderType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sorting type. 0 for descending order, 1 for ascending order. In descending order by default

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsSearchType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product status filter: 1 - Available/off the shelf 4 - Not yet published 5 - Draft 6 - Deleted

x-temu-request-parameters.name: searchText
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Search text, supports searching by goodName or goodsId

x-temu-request-parameters.name: statusFilterType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sub-status filter type. Please refer to Goods status description

x-temu-request-parameters.name: crtFrom
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Start time of creation, enter timestamp, 13 bits in milliseconds

x-temu-request-parameters.name: crtTo
x-temu-request-parameters.description: end time of creation, enter timestamp, 13 bits in milliseconds

x-temu-request-parameters.name: catIdList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Cat id list, supports both leaf and non-leaf cat id, supports batch

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsStatusFilterType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product status filter New version field

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsSubStatusFilterType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product sub-status filter New version field

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsStatusChangeTimeFrom
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Start time of goods status change, pass parameters by timestamp

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsStatusChangeTimeTo
x-temu-request-parameters.description: End time of goods status change, pass parameters by timestamp

x-temu-response-parameters.name: success
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Current request success status: returns True if successful, otherwise returns False.

x-temu-response-parameters.name: errorCode
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Error code: Used to refer to the error codes below, which can help find the corresponding solutions for each error.

x-temu-response-parameters.name: errorMsg
x-temu-response-parameters.description: Error message: The feedback content corresponding to the error code.

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `bg.local.goods.list.query` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

pageSize.description: Page size, indicating the number of records returned per page, with a limit of 100 per page

orderField.description: Sorting field. Supports sorting by goodsId, createTime, goodsName, outGoodsSn, quantity, price. Sorted by creation time by default

orderType.description: Sorting type. 0 for descending order, 1 for ascending order. In descending order by default

goodsSearchType.description: Product status filter: 1 - Available/off the shelf 4 - Not yet published 5 - Draft 6 - Deleted

searchText.description: Search text, supports searching by goodName or goodsId

statusFilterType.description: Sub-status filter type. Please refer to Goods status description

crtFrom.description: Start time of creation, enter timestamp, 13 bits in milliseconds

crtTo.description: end time of creation, enter timestamp, 13 bits in milliseconds

catIdList.description: Cat id list, supports both leaf and non-leaf cat id, supports batch

goodsStatusFilterType.description: Product status filter New version field

goodsSubStatusFilterType.description: Product sub-status filter New version field

goodsStatusChangeTimeFrom.description: Start time of goods status change, pass parameters by timestamp

goodsStatusChangeTimeTo.description: End time of goods status change, pass parameters by timestamp

success.description: Current request success status: returns True if successful, otherwise returns False.

errorCode.description: Error code: Used to refer to the error codes below, which can help find the corresponding solutions for each error.

errorMsg.description: Error message: The feedback content corresponding to the error code.
